'''Chal''' was a crewman of the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], sometimes serving as a [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
